author: 本人不在😉
content:
[关于抖音的一些反馈仅供参考] 1.关于抖音推送问题：抖音会反复推送一些我点过不感兴趣的内容，然后进行关键词屏蔽也没有用。
2.关于抖音审核问题：抖音关于营销号的审核以及对于评论的审核不合理。第一营销号的很多内容为恶意剪辑曲解，目的为获取流量，很多不明真相的人会跟风发表一些不正当言论
3.抖音在搜索词推送问题：我主动多次搜索并且已经关注本人为粉丝的情况下会推很多恶意p图，恶意剪辑，网暴他人的引导性言论。
综上：抖音的很多行为具有引导性，不当性，不符合清朗行动的要求，审核应加大审核力度。

author: wiemz
content: [using us to train AI] they just opted EVERYONE in “AI remix,” which means that every video you’ve ever posted, public or private, is now automatically used to train whatever AI they’re building. this includes unpublished drafts, stories, and i’m sure messages and any data they have about you/your account. to disable the feature, you have to individually toggle it off for every single video you have ever posted and every video in your drafts. people have been spending hours toggling off the “AI remix” permission on their videos, only to find later that the permission was switched back on. with the lacking data privacy laws in the US, i’m sure this is somehow legal. but it is disgusting, unethical, and a breach of privacy. we have the right to our own likenesses and our own IP. i never consented to training generative AI and i DO NOT want my videos used in any form for those purposes. it’s a complete violation. NOBODY WANTS THIS.

content: [shop is the worst] i bought a keychain last month from a UTDR fan who told me i was their first buyer. tiktok messed up the shipping process, told me my order was delayed for weeks even AFTER i received it, and then tiktok and USPS refused to believe me, never answered my questions, consistently told me i was either misled or lying about receiving the package even though i sent them photos, barely even let me speak to a real person, and never fixed the shipping status. the seller refunded me today, and i offered to pay them back (no response yet, but they're very kind, this is NOT their fault). i'm currently looking at the keychain, and the refunded money for the keychain i supposedly never got. but i'm lying about that too, right? this is the fastest way to kill an online shopping site i've ever seen. Stupid and lame devs made a stupid and lame decision…again.

author: Buckscout
content: [Billionaires is gonna  billionaire] Another major increase in the price at Netflix with a reduction in quality and content.

author: Samsmith4115
content:
[So dissapointing] I paused my account less than a week ago. This was done on purpose as I did not have the extra funds this month. I wake up to a $20 charge two days after my normal billing date from Netflix. I started a chat with customer support & the support was incredibly poor. The agent stated that I was charged because I placed a hold last month so obviously I’d be charged this month. This is a blatant lie. When I let them know how much of an inconvenience this was their response was something like “we understand this is an inconvenience but it is system based”. ???? 

Netflix I’ve tried so many times to keep you around but with the raise in prices, new household rules and customer support that doesn’t care about your paying customers I’m done done!

author: thissucksmybuty
content: [Expensive as hell] I love the variety of shows on Netflix and movies but the price keeps going up and up which if it keeps going up unfortunately I will probably have to cancel my subscription  which I wont be happy to do but if they keep raising the price there not leaving me with any other choice to cancel my prescription !

author: J^¥£v$#
content: [Great entertainment] Great selection of shows and great documentaries .there’s always something to watch

author: Sankerbrand
content:
[Lack of communication on device compatibility] I have an older iPad that until recently worked fine with Netflix. But now it doesn’t because the iOS system is older and the current version of Netflix doesn’t work well on it. If I had known that I never would’ve updated to the latest version of the app. Netflix did not share any details about that when I downloaded the app that I saw. As a user experience designer this falls into the really bad experience category. You need to account for these off case user scenarios.

Doesn’t seem a way to revert to an older version either. I’m stuck with an app that sometimes plays, sometimes doesn’t play. The control buttons don’t work well and I’m forced to quit the app to get whatever I’m watching to stop playing. Can’t afford to upgrade my iPad at the moment.

author: Donrinkles
content: [Extra member] I was able to by pass the add a member “learn more screen”. So clicked in it hoping to find some way to exit out of that but the next screen said something about add a member but I didn’t realize that the add a member button was already highlighted  and instead of changing it  I hit the ok  button.

author: Devon Shia
content: [How good Netflix is.] It works all the time and I have no complaints.

author: GasherPrime
content: [New AppleTV app is unusable] I can’t seem to write a review for AppleTV directly so I’m using this platform instead. The AppleTV app only shows 4 tiles of content on an AppleTV anymore with a 50% screen preview effectively letting you see one show option at a time. I don’t know why this seems to be the trend. Maybe I’m just an outlier for AppleTV users that likes seeing more than one show option on my screen at a time and not single full screen previews like it’s 1995 and I’m channel flipping. I much prefer pretending it’s 2026 and I can see 10+ shows and titles at a time on a large 4k TV but, again, seems like AppleTV apps are going the way of one button press shows you one new show. I really dislike it.

author: Joe_in_LA
content:
[Siri Remote doesn’t work with NFLX] “The issue you're experiencing with Siri Remote voice commands not working with Netflix is likely due to the way Netflix integrates with the Siri Remote.
Some apps, like Hulu, have native support for Siri Remote voice commands, which allows for more seamless integration. However, Netflix may not have implemented this support as thoroughly.
When you use the Siri Remote with Netflix, the voice commands might not work as expected because Netflix doesn't fully support Siri's commands. This can result in errors like "I can't go back" when trying to navigate. If the issue persists, you can contact Netflix support to see if they have any known solutions or workarounds. Keep in mind that this is a known issue, and the solution might be limited until Netflix updates its app to better support Siri Remote voice commands.”

Netflix: ‘not our problem.’ Even tho it used to work.

author: kenzzzzziee
content: [Stupid household rules] I don’t understand why you guys started doing the household thing. I’m a college student and use my parents account but it doesn’t ever let me and I always have to get a code (which you can only do a certain amount of times) And now it’s not even letting me use it on my phone. Netflix is supposed to be the OG streaming service but it is severely going down because it’s just such an inconvenience to use. Please fix this it’s annoying af
